name: First State Bank Of Brownsboro
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank established in 1917, offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and deposit accounts with local ownership and online banking.
description_long:
First State Bank of Brownsboro was established in 1917 and has remained locally owned throughout its over 100-year history. The bank is known to its community as the "Friendly Bank" and positions itself as a relationship-focused financial institution serving both personal and business customers in the Brownsboro, Texas area. The bank is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

The bank offers a range of personal and business financial products designed to meet diverse customer needs. Their service lineup includes basic checking accounts (with a $100 minimum to open and per-check fees of $0.15 for checks exceeding 30 per monthly statement cycle), various deposit accounts, loan products for both personal and business purposes, online banking, mobile banking, and related financial services. They provide calculators, check reordering services, debit card replacement, and safe e-banking resources.

First State Bank of Brownsboro distinguishes itself through its long local history, community-oriented branding, and personal banking approach. The bank has opted out of participating in the Transaction Account Guarantee Program, which is a notable operational decision. They maintain physical branch locations with posted hours and provide comprehensive digital banking options including internet and mobile banking platforms.

This is a traditional community bank suitable for customers seeking personal relationships with their financial institution and local decision-making. However, the website provides limited detail on specific loan products, interest rates, fees beyond basic checking, and other service specifics. Consumers should contact the bank directly or visit in-person for comprehensive product details, rates, and terms.
services: Lost or stolen debit card replacement
Multiple branch locations with posted hours
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Over 100 years of continuous local ownership since 1917
Offers both personal and business banking products
Low minimum deposit requirement ($100) to open basic checking
Multiple digital banking channels including online and mobile banking
Physical branch locations with extended hours available
cons: Per-check fees ($0.15 per check over 30/month) can accumulate for high-volume check users
Website lacks specific details on loan products, rates, APYs, and comprehensive fee schedules
Limited information about products beyond basic checking and general loan categories
Opted out of Transaction Account Guarantee Program, reducing deposit protection beyond FDIC limits
No transparent online rate comparison or product pricing available on website
best_for: Community-oriented customers preferring local bank relationships and decision-making
Small business owners seeking personal banking relationships in the Brownsboro area
Customers who value 100+ year banking history and local ownership
Users comfortable with traditional banking who want both in-person and digital access
diagnosis: First State Bank of Brownsboro is best for customers in the Brownsboro, Texas area seeking traditional community banking with local ownership and personal relationships. Prospective customers should contact the bank directly or visit a branch to obtain detailed information about specific loan products, interest rates, fees, and terms, as the website provides limited product-specific details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
